name: property managers handling 5–15 lease renewals/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease renewals/month, inefficient tracking causes missed renewal opportunities. We automate report preparation instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of lease expirations and renewals

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tracking of lease expirations and renewals
